title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
